issues.description: Condition should check 'HasCardOnBoard' or life comparison, not 'HasRestingDon'. Card effect requires 'less Life cards than opponent', which is not directly representable in standard conditions. 'HasRestingDon' with count:1 does not match the life card comparison requirement.

Trigger 'Activated' is incorrect. This is a passive static ability, not an activated ability. Should use 'Trigger' or be represented as a state-based effect. Condition should apply continuously during gameplay.
Second effect (TrashFromHand → PlaySelf) does not appear in card text. This effect is extraneous and should be removed.

Power boost only addresses one part of the effect. Card also grants protection: 'cannot be K.O.'d in battle by <Slash> attribute cards'. This protection mechanic is completely missing from DSL and requires additional action or keyword to represent.
The [DON!! x1] cost is present in effect text but not represented in the DSL structure at all. Cost should be documented separately from the effect condition.
